THIRD-PARTY LIBRARIES AND LICENSES
==================================

This software uses several open-source libraries. The following information
is provided in accordance with their respective licenses.

---

GLFW — zlib/libpng License
https://www.glfw.org/license.html

GLAD — Public Domain (CC0)
https://glad.dav1d.de/

GLM — MIT License
https://github.com/g-truc/glm/blob/master/copying.txt

miniaudio — Public Domain or MIT License (your choice)
https://github.com/mackron/miniaudio

stb libraries (stb_image, stb_truetype, stb_vorbis, etc.)
Public Domain or MIT License (varies by file)
https://github.com/nothings/stb
